---
title: "Processing"
---
::: {.callout-tip collapse=true}
# Learning Goals: Language Processing
(To be added)

:::

| Date | Topic | Slides | Due |
| - | --- | - | --- |
| Thurs 11/12 | Phonemes; categorical perception | | <span class="reading-badge">SGN p. 39-40; p. 51-77</span>
| Tues 11/17 | Motor system involvement | | <span class="article-badge">Möttönen & Watkins (2009)</span>
| Thurs 11/19 | Constituency in psycholinguistics || <span class="reading-badge">SGN p. 139-155</span>
| Tues 11/24 | Constituency in the brain || <span class="article-badge">Pallier et al. (2011)</span>
| Thurs 11/26 | *No class (Thanksgiving)* |
| Tues 12/1 |  <span class="exam-badge">Exam #4</span>


**Resources** 

* [Categorical Perception stimuli](https://splab.net/apd/u100/)
* [The McGurk effect](https://www.intro2psycholing.net/resources/McGurk/McGurk1.php)
* [The phoneme restoration effect](https://learninglink.oup.com/access/content/sedivy-2e-student-resources/sedivy2e-chapter-7-web-activity-4?previousFilter=tag_activities)
